text: Stepping into this space, I feel a mixture of curiosity and anticipation. The clean lines of the room and the bright white lights make me feel alert and ready to observe. Yet, glass walls and stark displays impart a sense of detachment, as if I am peering into a place dedicated to thinking and creating, more than simply experiencing. The focus on R+D—the relentless pursuit of innovation—evokes an intellectual thrill, but also whispers of the impersonal, systematic march of progress. I am both fascinated and distanced, compelled to reflect on the interface between human ingenuity and the sterile environments where it so often flourishes.
